title: Designing a Scalable Recommendation Engine
scenario: Design a recommendation engine for a large-scale e-commerce platform. The engine should be able to handle millions of user interactions and generate personalized product recommendations. The output should be a Python code snippet representing the recommendation engine.
constraints: Must use the 'matrix factorization' technique for recommendation generation
Must be able to handle 'categorical' data
Must include a 'scaler' function for data preprocessing

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the generated recommendation engine accurately generate personalized recommendations based on user interactions?
Is the generated recommendation engine scalable, able to handle large-scale user interactions and data?
Is the generated Python code readable, well-structured, and adhering to best practices?
